description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabin with a prominent gable roof covered in brown shingles. The front facade features a centered wooden door flanked by two rectangular windows, each with white framing. The side facades each have two symmetrically placed windows, while the rear facade mirrors the window arrangement of the sides. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving the structure a rustic appearance. The roof has a moderate overhang, providing some shelter to the entryway. The cabin sits on a small raised platform with a single step leading to the front door.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable shingle roof, symmetrical windows, and a centered front door on a small raised platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the centered door, two flanking windows, and the shingled gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view displaying two symmetrically placed windows and the full length of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with three evenly spaced windows and no visible door.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with two windows and the gable roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs and asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Symmetrical arrangement with two rectangular windows on each side and three evenly spaced windows on the rear; all windows are of similar size and shape.
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade, flanked by windows.
